subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast in the Covenant and Testament! Since the time of thy return until now, due to the absence of correspondence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ بر عهد و میثاق بعد از رجوع آن جناب الی الان از عدم ارسال مکاتبات
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
